name: Shrimp Scampi Primavera
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and drain spaghetti according to package instructions.
2. Meanwhile, heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
3. Add garlic and lemon peel; sauté for about 30 seconds.
4. Add vegetables and shrimp; cook and stir until the shrimp turn pink (5-7 minutes).
5. Sprinkle with lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Stir in basil and parsley.
6. Spoon the mixture over the pasta and toss well.
